title: ADULT GROUP HOMES - 211info
text: ALBERTINA KERR ADULT GROUP HOMES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides homes for adults with I/DD, including autism, supporting each person’s independence, skill-building, and community participation. Residents have access to behavioral and mental health services, medication administration, self-advocacy training, and connections to community activities, including education, vocational training, or employment. Staff help with daily self-care while encouraging independent living skills like shopping and managing money. Residents have private bedrooms and share common areas with housemates who have similar interests and support needs. The program does not provide 2:1 or 1:1 caregiver-to-resident staffing ratios. 424 NE 22nd Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Age 18 and older with an I/DD diagnosis, including autism Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 239-8101 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 239-8101 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment applications or please contact your local Community Developmental Disabilities Program FEES: OHP verity DOCUMENTS: Intake screener may ask for individuals name, date of birth, guardian information, insurance information, current behaviors of concern, past mental health treatment, current medications, and current treatment providers. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Marion, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Older Adult/Disability Related Supportive Housing Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - I/DD EMPLOYMENT SERVICES EMPLOYMENT - VOCATIONAL SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INCLUSIVE DAY SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RESIDENTIAL CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ALBERTINA KERR
